UDR01 — UEL National Student Survey Explorer

University of East London (UKPRN 10007144) · 2023, 2024, 2025 & 2026 · Registering & Teaching datasets

Theme scores

Responses & turnout

Subject areas

Source: Office for Students, NSS provider data for University of East London (UKPRN 10007144). NSS23/24/25/26_10007144.xlsx, 'Registering' and 'Teaching' tabs.

Registering = students registered at UEL, wherever taught. Teaching = students taught at UEL, wherever registered. These are different (overlapping) cohorts - see the Dataset control above. All (blended) is an approximate response-weighted average of the two and should be read as indicative only, since the underlying populations only partially overlap.

Since the 2023 NSS redesign, there is no standalone "overall satisfaction" question for English providers (including UEL) - results are reported on the 7 core themes only. NSS surveys final-year undergraduates only; there is no postgraduate split.

Subject levels, broadest to narrowest: All subjects → CAH1 (subject area) → CAH2 (subject group) → CAH3 (course group). Click any row in the right-hand table to drill down; use the breadcrumb to go back up. At UEL, 7 of the 13 CAH1 subject areas (e.g. Law, Computing, Media/journalism/communications) have only one, identically-named CAH2 group underneath them - for those, this dashboard skips straight from CAH1 to CAH3 automatically, since the CAH2 step would show nothing new.

Tick 2 or 3 years to compare them directly - the chart, table and drill-down list all switch to a per-year comparison. Untick the Benchmark box to hide the sector-benchmark series if you just want to focus on the raw scores. A missing value means that split wasn't published for that dataset/year/subject (below the 10-response / 50%-response-rate publication threshold, or a suppressed benchmark for that split - shown as "BK" in the source file).


Data files: Data/NSS Data/UEL/NSS23_10007144.xlsx, NSS24_10007144.xlsx, NSS25_10007144.xlsx, NSS26_10007144.xlsx (Registering & Teaching tabs).
